---
title: "Team Members"
pageId: "69ef0c339b4ca5aaa64976b8"
---

From the **Settings menu,** select **Team Members **\(see Figure 1\).

The **Team Members** section includes three main tabs:

- **Team Members** – Displays a list of all active members within the workspace, along with their assigned roles and registration status.
- **Invited** – Shows pending invitations sent to collaborators who have not yet joined the workspace.
- **Roles** – Allows administrators to define and manage role\-based access permissions for team members.

## **Team Members Tab**

![](data:image/png;base64,)

- Displays all **active members** currently added to the workspace \(see Figure 1\).
- Each entry includes:
  - **Member Email** – Identifies the registered email of the user.
  - **Role** – Displays the assigned role, such as *Site Admin*, *Collaborator*, or *Viewer*.
  - **Invitee** – Shows if the member was invited or is an original workspace owner.

**Actions Available:**

- Use the **Search bar** to find members quickly.
- Use the **Invite** button \(located at the top\-right\) to add new members.

### **Managing Team Members**

When you hover over any member in the **Team Members** tab, a **More Options** menu appears with two actions \(see Figure 2\).

![](data:image/png;base64,)

**Remove Member**

- Select **Remove Member** to delete the user from the workspace.
- After removal, a confirmation message appears at the bottom of the screen.

**Change Role**

- Select **Change Role** to update a member’s assigned role.
- A role selection panel opens, allowing you to choose a new role from the dropdown list.
- Click **Save Changes** to apply the update.
- A success message confirms the role update at the bottom of the screen.

## **Invited Tab**

![](data:image/png;base64,)

- Lists all **pending **or** expired invitations** sent to users who haven’t yet joined the workspace \(see Figure 3\).
- Displays columns for:
  - **Member** – Email address of the invited user.
  - **Invitee** – The person who sent the invitation.
  - **Status** – Indicates whether the invite is still pending or expired.
- This tab helps track invitation status and manage pending access requests efficiently.

**Actions Available:**

- Use the **Search bar** to locate invited users easily.
- Use the **Invite** button \(top\-right corner\) to send new invitations.

### **Inviting a New Team Member**

- When you click the **Invite** button, the **Invite Team Members** panel appears on the right side of the screen \(see Figure 4\).

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Follow these steps to invite a new user to the workspace:

- Enter the user’s email address in the **Type an Email and press Enter** field and press **Enter**.
- To add multiple users, enter each email and press **Enter**, or separate email addresses with commas.
- Select a role type from the **Role Type** dropdown \(for example, *Site Admin*, *Collaborator*, or *Viewer*\).
- Click **Invite** to send the invitation.
- The invited user receives an email with instructions to join the workspace. Their details will appear under the **Invited tab** until they accept the invitation.
- Once the user accepts the invitation, their status updates from **Invited** to the assigned **role type** in the **Team Members** tab.

### **Managing Invited Members**

In the **Invited** tab, you can manage users who have been invited but have not yet accepted their workspace invitation. 

When you hover over an invited user, a **More Options** menu appears with two actions \(see Figure 5\).

![](data:image/png;base64,)

**Revoke Invitation**

- Select **Revoke Invitation** to cancel the pending invitation.
- A confirmation dialog appears with the message: 

>

- Click **OK** to confirm the revocation, or select **Cancel** to discard the action.
- Once revoked, the invitation is removed from the list, and a confirmation message appears at the bottom of the screen.

**Resend Invitation**

- Select **Resend Invitation** to send the invitation email again to the user.
- A confirmation dialog appears with the message: 

>

- Click **OK** to confirm resending the invitation, or select **Cancel** to discard the action.
- This is useful if the user did not receive or missed the original invitation.
- A success message confirms that the invitation has been resent.

## **Roles Tab**

![](data:image/png;base64,)

- Displays all predefined **workspace roles** and their associated **permissions **\(see Figure 6\).
- The available roles include:
  - **Viewer** – Has *Read\-only* access to all documentation content.
  - **Collaborator** – Can *Read* and *Write* documentation but cannot delete content.
  - **Site Admin** – Has full access, including *Read*, *Write*, and *Delete* permissions.
- Each permission type is visually represented with color\-coded labels for clarity:
  - **Read** \(purple\)
  - **Write** \(green\)
  - **Delete** \(red\)
- This structure allows fine\-grained control over access and collaboration.

**Actions Available:**

- Use the **Search bar** to filter through roles.
- Use the **Invite** button \(top\-right corner\) to add members directly and assign them roles.

>
